Who I Am

About Me

I am a graduate of Bachelor of Industrial Technology, Major in Computer Technology at Cebu Technological University — San Francisco Camotes Campus. I graduated in June 2026 with Latin honors — Cum Laude — from Batch 2025–2026.

My education gave me a strong foundation in both hardware and software: from building and repairing computers to developing full-stack web systems. I enjoy solving real problems through technology — whether it is a library management tool, a feedback survey platform, or helping a student fix a broken laptop.

During my OJT at Sacred Heart School Ateneo de Cebu, I developed not just technical skills but also the values that matter most — communication, service, and a commitment to always doing more. The school's spirit of Magis continues to guide how I work and lead.

Built During OJT

SHS Library Attendance Monitoring System

A complete web-based library attendance system developed for Sacred Heart School Ateneo de Cebu. Students and faculty log their library visits and select their purpose. The library admin monitors all records through a real-time dashboard — built with PHP, MySQL, Apache, and VS Code.

Visitor form — students type their name and select purpose of visit
Secure administrator login panel with Ateneo de Cebu branding
Visitor logs — full record of all student and faculty visits with category and purpose
Admin dashboard overview — total visits, student count, and staff count
PHP MySQL phpMyAdmin XAMPP Apache VS Code HTML / CSS JavaScript

Academic Research · May 2025

Undergraduate Thesis

Bachelor's Thesis · CTU San Francisco

Enhancing Online Public Access Catalog Through Web-Based Survey Feedback and Analysis

Research Group Leader

Christian Philip S. Sayson

This research improved the OPAC system at CTU by adding a web-based survey and feedback mechanism — allowing students, faculty, and staff to report issues and suggest improvements directly.

The system was deployed locally on a Dell OptiPlex 3020 running Ubuntu with Nginx, PHP, and MySQL. Gemini AI API auto-generates analysis and recommendations from collected feedback.

Drupal 10 Ubuntu Nginx PHP MySQL Gemini AI ISO/IEC 25010 Agile SDLC
Printed & bound thesis — College of Technology & Engineering, CTU
Dell OptiPlex 3020 — the mini PC running the local Nginx server
Live survey on CTU Sanfran Learning Centre — built with Drupal 10
